[ ](<../../../../index.html#org.apache.flink.api.package@scala> "Permalink")

The Flink Scala API.

The Flink Scala API. [org.apache.flink.api.scala.ExecutionEnvironment](<scala/ExecutionEnvironment.html>) is the starting-point of any Flink program. It can be used to read from local files, HDFS, or other sources. [org.apache.flink.api.scala.DataSet](<scala/DataSet.html>) is the main abstraction of data in Flink. It provides operations that create new DataSets via transformations. [org.apache.flink.api.scala.GroupedDataSet](<scala/GroupedDataSet.html>) provides operations on grouped data that results from org.apache.flink.api.scala.DataSet.groupBy().

Use [org.apache.flink.api.scala.ExecutionEnvironment.getExecutionEnvironment](<scala/ExecutionEnvironment$.html#getExecutionEnvironment:org.apache.flink.api.scala.ExecutionEnvironment>) to obtain an execution environment. This will either create a local environment or a remote environment, depending on the context where your program is executing.
